Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}At Wakatsu Kitchen, you can order the Prodigy Platter—rich in omega-3s—to help you raise your {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}. Time will pass if you eat here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}If you come by on certain nights, there may be new items on the menu that aren't normally available.[n]{f 1 1}
